response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience but lacks the critical requirements for this role: native-level Japanese proficiency is not indicated, embedded firmware/LAN-switch experience is absent, and C for UNIX with Linux kernel modification is not demonstrated. The resume shows web, full-stack, and some D-language work, but no security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal) or networking protocols (NETCONF, SNMP) relevant to embedded switch products.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience across diverse stacks
Some exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments and Linux-based systems
Strong testing discipline (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing)
concerns: No indication of Japanese language proficiency (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or network security technology experience
No demonstrated Linux kernel investigation/modification or C-for-UNIX depth
